rationale: Codebase-pin lens: every claim verified against 1ad0d796. `go build ./...` clean. `go test -count=1 ./plugins/... ./internal/setup/...` both packages green (0 failures in scope). Named tests PASS: TestWorkflowFiles_EmbedsMsPanel, TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet, TestRunClaude_FreshSetup, TestRunClaude_Idempotent. `diff -q plugins/mindspec/workflows/ms-panel.js .claude/workflows/ms-panel.js` -> identical (526 lines each, byte-for-byte). WorkflowFiles() exists at embed.go:55 (flat basename map, //go:embed workflows/*) and is consumed at claude.go:167 and claude_test.go:120. installWorkflows is defined at claude.go:217 and called ONLY at claude.go:167 inside RunClaude (def claude.go:148); RunCodex (codex.go) and RunCopilot (copilot.go) contain zero references. A dedicated test TestClaudeSetup_InstallsWorkflowClaudeTargetOnly PASSES, proving RunCodex/RunCopilot create no .claude/workflows nor .agents/workflows -- stronger than a grep. Created-count edit is base+1: FreshSetup 14->15, Idempotent Skipped 14->15 (base 14 on this branch, +1 for the workflow file), consistent with the tests' passing runtime count. Scope-fence exact: 7 files, +1487/-9. Left git status clean; no /tmp scratch used.
findings: go test -count=1 ./plugins/... ./internal/setup/... : both green (ok plugins/mindspec 0.885s, ok internal/setup 19.421s).
diff -q both ms-panel.js copies -> identical; wc -l = 526 each.
WorkflowFiles() defined plugins/mindspec/embed.go:55; used internal/setup/claude.go:167 + claude_test.go:120.
installWorkflows called ONLY at claude.go:167 inside RunClaude (claude.go:148); no reference in codex.go RunCodex or copilot.go RunCopilot.
Bonus test TestClaudeSetup_InstallsWorkflowClaudeTargetOnly PASS: RunCodex/RunCopilot produce no .claude/workflows or .agents/workflows.
Created-count is base+1: FreshSetup len(Created) 14->15; Idempotent Skipped 14->15 -- matches passing runtime count of 15.
Commit scope exact: 7 files, +1487/-9 insertions, matching the BRIEF manifest.
The 2 known pre-existing failures (harness, instruct z4ps) are outside the two tested packages -- both packages reported ok.
